name: GitHubToolInstaller
description: Install any tool from GitHub releases
author: Dmytro Bondar

inputs.name: connection
inputs.label: GitHub Connection
inputs.helpMarkDown: GitHub service connection for authentication. Required if `GITHUB_TOKEN` environment variable is not set

inputs.name: version
inputs.label: Version
inputs.helpMarkDown: Version to install: `latest`, exact version (`v1.2.3`), or semver range (`1.0.x`, `~1.2.0`, `^1.0.0`)

inputs.name: filePattern
inputs.label: File Pattern
inputs.helpMarkDown: Glob pattern to filter release assets when auto-detection finds multiple matches (e.g., `mytool_*`)
